title: pgstat — Locks & Activity
description: Aktif sorgu, bekleme olaylari, idle in transaction, blocking chain, vacuum/analyze progress.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and state = 'active'
select count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and state = 'idle in transaction'
select count(*) as value from fact.pg_lock_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and granted = false
select count(*) as value from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes'

select $__timeGroupAlias(snapshot_ts, $__interval), state as metric, count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(snapshot_ts) and state is not null group by 1, state order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(snapshot_ts, $__interval), wait_event_type as metric, count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(snapshot_ts) and wait_event_type is not null group by 1, wait_event_type order by 1

select snapshot_ts, pid, datname, usename as "user", state, wait_event_type, wait_event, extract(epoch from (snapshot_ts - query_start))::int as "süre_sn", left(query, 200) as query from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and state = 'active' and query_start is not null and (snapshot_ts - query_start) > interval '1 minute' order by query_start asc limit 50

panels.title: Blocking Chains (granted=false, anlık)
panels.description: Kim kimi bekliyor — bekleyen lock'lar ve onları bloklayan PID'ler.

targets.rawSql: select snapshot_ts, pid as "bekleyen_pid", locktype, mode, array_to_string(blocked_by_pids, ',') as "blocked_by", coalesce(extract(epoch from (snapshot_ts - waitstart))::int, 0) as "bekleme_sn" from fact.pg_lock_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_lock_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance) and granted = false order by waitstart asc limit 50

select snapshot_ts, command, datname, relname, phase, blocks_total, blocks_done, tuples_total, tuples_done, progress_pct from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance) order by command, relname
